title: Sid Meier's Civilization® III Complete

notes:
I had to add "KeepRes=1" at the top of the config file:
"/home/victor/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/common/Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete/Conquests/conquests.ini"

Just like in the Windows version to use a high resolution. Except that here it's necessary to prevent crashing.

title: Sid Meier's Civilization® III Complete

notes:
Started up fine and gave me the main menu but would crash when loading into a world. I fixed this by adding the option "PlayIntro=0" into the Conquests/conquests.ini file. I also recommend adding the option "KeepRes=1" into the .ini in order to fix resolution problems. Now it loads saves fine, but the terrain on the map will not render if you have selected a settler or have a town in the field of vision of the camera. Unplayable since cities are an essential gameplay element. 

Disabling Fsync and Esync did not help and Large Address and Old GL Strings crashed the game. Other options hardly matter since this game runs on DirectX 8.0
title: Sid Meier's Civilization® III Complete
